block.createimp.brass_scrap_bucket.toolt: Destroys _all_ input items and fluids, harvesting _Experience_ _Nuggets_ in the process. _Squat and use an empty hand_ or _logistics_ to retrieve them. A _filter_ can be configured on the side. When placed below a _container_ _or_ _fluid_ _tank_, it can be set to _automatically_ keep the inventory _below_ _a_ _set_ _amount_.
text.autoconfig.createimp.title: Create Improve Config
item.createimp.network_manager.tooltip.s: A tool for creating and managing network labels based on existing logistics networks, and applying them to logistics devices at any time.
item.createimp.network_manager.tooltip.c: When sneaking and right-clicking a connected network device
item.createimp.network_manager.tooltip.b: Opens the _Add Network Label_ menu to _name_ the label and _set an icon_ with an item. _Multiple labels_ can be created for the same network.
Opens the _Network Label Manager_. _Left-click a label_ to _select it_.
Right-click a _logistics network device_ to apply _the network under that label_.
